children.name: Product defects

`cy.visit()` failed trying to load:

https://www.automationexercise.com/

The response we received from your web server was:

  > 503: Service Unavailable

This was considered a failure because the status code was not `2xx`.

If you do not want status codes to cause failures pass the option: `failOnStatusCode: false`
deve validar Homepage com LCP < 2500ms e CLS < 0,1

Timed out retrying after 15050ms: `cy.click()` failed because this element is not visible:

`<button class="btn btn-success close-modal btn-block" data-dismiss="modal">Continu...</button>`

This element `<button.btn.btn-success.close-modal.btn-block>` is not visible because its parent `<div#cartModal.modal.fade>` has CSS property: `display: none`

Fix this problem, or use `{force: true}` to disable error checking.
